manifest.author: votsz
manifest.changelog:
CHANGELOG DETAILED 🇺🇸

■ Animated themes have been added again in direct

■ By pressing on the bottom in a conversation, you can change the topic of the conversation in direct

■ I removed some boring warnings while using Instagram

■ When pressing and holding for a while in a reels, there will be some tools that you can use (⛔️I got into trouble watching in 2x)

■ Make a silent post that does not go to the feed (premium feature, then it will stop working)

■ New look when seeing the interactions your stories have had

■ The gallery in direct has been repaired

■ I put the features of the new Instagram subscription back (there is a method to be able to use them)

■ New options when clicking the repost button

■ Bugs solved

■ All quicksnap-related commands and instants have been removed (will have a separate application)
manifest.name: votsz's Backup
manifest.description: Backup for those who want new functions before the public, maximum quality and Stable
